channel.title: Clean Power Consulting Group Blog
channel.description: Insights on solar energy, clean technology, and building a career in the energy transition from Tim Montague.

item.title: Wired for Intelligence: How AI is Revolutionizing the Clean Energy Industry
item.description: Explore how artificial intelligence is transforming the clean energy sector — from solar site assessment to grid optimization to predictive maintenance.
item.author: tim@cleanpowerhour.com (Tim Montague)

item.title: Why I Believe in a Smarter, Safer Clean Energy Future: Solar, Storage & AI
item.description: Tim Montague shares his vision for a clean energy future powered by solar, battery storage, and artificial intelligence — and why the convergence of these technologies changes everything.
item.author: tim@cleanpowerhour.com (Tim Montague)

item.title: From Resi to Commercial Solar: A Solar Industry Perspective
item.description: Tim Montague shares his journey in the solar industry and insights on transitioning from residential to commercial solar on the Solar Surge Podcast.
item.author: tim@cleanpowerhour.com (Tim Montague)

item.title: Montague Discusses Clean Energy Transition on Earth911 Podcast
item.description: Tim Montague joins Earth911 to discuss the Inflation Reduction Act, bipartisan infrastructure, and the progress — and challenges — of the clean energy transition.
item.author: tim@cleanpowerhour.com (Tim Montague)

item.title: Tips for Connecting with Leads in the C&I Solar Sales Process
item.description: Learn proven strategies for connecting with warm leads in the commercial and industrial solar sales process — one of the most challenging parts of C&I solar development.
item.author: tim@cleanpowerhour.com (Tim Montague)
